reviews.text: Stacy and Trent were absolutely amazing. We worked with them for both our engagement session and our wedding, and they made the entire experience feel easy and comfortable from start to finish. We specifically wanted photographers who could capture real emotion, movement, and energy not just posed portraits and they delivered exactly that. They were responsive, easy to communicate with, and such a joy to be around on the day. 10/10 would recommend.

Working with Gillespie Photography was an extraordinary privilege. They are unbelievably creative and worked tirelessly — not only throughout the wedding weekend, but for months beforehand — to understand the narrative of our celebration and capture it with intention and artistry.

The photographs they created for us do not simply document a wedding; they tell the full, emotional story of our weekend, and they are images we know will be cherished by our family forever.

They guided us with ease, never once forcing a contrived pose, and created an atmosphere where we could be entirely ourselves. Their presence was effortless — they blended seamlessly into the rhythm of the weekend, capturing spontaneous, unscripted moments just as beautifully as the composed ones.

We laughed with them, trusted them, and genuinely enjoyed being photographed — and that trust radiates through every image.

We could not recommend them more highly.

I wish I could rate Trent more than 5 stars, because he's absolutely one of the finest wedding professionals I have ever worked with. The photographer for my client's wedding broke his hand one week before the wedding, and Trent stepped in to cover it. He drove 4 hours to be in Moab, shot the couple and the wedding all day, and then stayed to help my crew clean up the site at the end of the night, despite needing to be back in Breck the next day for another gig. He was fantastic to work with from our first communication, and he had a lovely demeanor the entire time. I can't recommend him highly enough. Thank you Trent!

We are so glad we hired Trent to photograph our wedding! He went above and beyond in multiple ways for us. We had a lot of plans change at the last second due to weather. Trent was able to shoot a ski lap with all our family and friends the day before, not only being there early but also coordinated and lead the entire thing at the last minute! The day of the wedding he also kept everything running smoothly and again took on more roles than just wedding photographer, everything we needed he had a solution for! After the wedding he got our pictures back to us incredibly fast, and we love all of them. We got a slideshow first that really allowed us to relive the day and we absolutely love our photos. Trent was so much fun to work with and we were so grateful to have him capture our wedding day!! We would highly recommend him!!

Absolutely incredible experience with Stacy from Gillespie Photo! Stacy is not only an amazing photographer but also such a fun and positive person to be around. From helping us with planning to keeping everything running smoothly on the big day, she went above and beyond. Her energy made everyone comfortable, and the photos turned out beyond stunning. We couldn’t be happier with how everything came together. I’d recommend Stacy to anyone looking for a talented, organized, and genuinely wonderful photographer!
